query:
SELECT 'tournaments_total' AS metrica, COUNT(*) AS valor FROM tournaments
UNION ALL SELECT 'tournaments_active_visible', COUNT(*) FROM tournaments WHERE isAvailable = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'tournaments_with_api_id', COUNT(*) FROM tournaments WHERE apiFootballLeagueId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'games_total', COUNT(*) FROM games
UNION ALL SELECT 'games_with_result', COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE scoreA IS NOT NULL AND scoreB IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'games_finished', COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE status = 'finished'
UNION ALL SELECT 'games_future_scheduled', COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE matchDate > NOW() AND status = 'scheduled'
UNION ALL SELECT 'teams_total', COUNT(*) FROM teams
UNION ALL SELECT 'sync_logs_total', COUNT(*) FROM api_sync_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'sync_logs_today', COUNT(*) FROM api_sync_log WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE()
UNION ALL SELECT 'quota_used_today', COALESCE((SELECT requestsUsed FROM api_quota_tracker WHERE date = CURDATE() LIMIT 1), 0);
